hero.title: Board of Directors
hero.subtitle: Decades of NBFC, banking and technology leadership — co-travelling with India's MSMEs on their entrepreneurial journey.

items.name: Rangarajan Krishnan
items.bio: Finance professional with over 20 years of experience across Five Star Business Finance (Joint MD & CEO), Standard Chartered Bank, HDFC Bank, International Finance Corporation and Spark Capital. Expertise spans business, collections, technology, operations, credit and legal — having managed portfolios across corporate banking, mid-market, South-East Asia infrastructure financing and investment banking.

items.name: Jayalakshmi Rangarajan
items.bio: Technology professional with wide-ranging experience across software development and consultancy, including Wipro Technologies and Ahaguru Education Technology. Brings key insights into technology models that enhance productivity and build robust systems.

items.name: G. Madhan Mohan
items.bio: 21+ years of work in MSME markets across Credit Policy, Underwriting, Collections, Fraud Control, Operations, Sales and Strategy. Helped set up the MSME vertical at RBL Bank and built the Business Correspondent model at Swadhaar Finserve. Earlier at Fullerton India, Sahayata Microfinance and Vistaar Financial Services.

items.name: Akash S. Chelvam
items.bio: Co-founder and core team member at Prayaan Capital, leading the human resources function and helping shape the company's culture as it scales across India.
